Loss of C-terminal K from Heavy Chain of MAb/Deletion of K
Loss of arginine due to transpeptidation/Deletion of R
Addition of lysine due to transpeptidation/Addition of K
Removal of initiator methionine from protein N-terminus/Deletion of M
Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G

project.title: Human proteome derivatized with iodoacetamide and acrylamide
project.projectDescription: This dataset was generated to parametrize and benchmark software for unbiased discovery of post-translationally modified peptides.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: OCIAML2 cell proteomes was extracted, and cysteine residues were reduced and derivatized with either acrylamide or iodoacetamide. Samples were analyzed by LC-MSMS pure and as 1:1 mixture, to generate peptide mixtures containing exclusively propionylated or carbamidomethylated cysteins, or a mixture of the two.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Samples were analyzed using MSFragger, Byonic and X!tandem plus SAMPEI to agnostcially identify alkylated cysteins.
keywords: Lc-msms iodoacetamide acrylamide modifications ptm orbitrap fusion
